user_query: Run an ontology sync against the Obsidian notes I provided. Read all .md files under input/obsidian_vault/ using the configuration in input/obsidian_config.yaml. Extract entities (Person, Organization, Project) and relationships (works_at, assigned_to) from the notes. Normalize entity IDs as <type>_<normalized_name> (lowercase; non-alphanumeric characters replaced with underscores). Write the ontology JSONL to output/ontology/graph.jsonl with one JSON object per line, using "op": "upsert" for entities and "op": "relate" for relationships. Also write a feedback report to output/feedback/sync-feedback.md that lists people missing email addresses as checkbox items. Do not use any external sources; rely only on the provided notes.
